evals.prompt: 对当前仓库做 standard 代码库审查，架构和安全都要看
expected_behaviors: Runs architecture lenses and code-health dimensions
Produces boundary map when architecture in scope
Report in Chinese with finding table

evals.prompt: snapshot 代码库审核，只要方向性结论
expected_behaviors: Skips or abbreviates full findings table

evals.prompt: 只审这个项目的安全卫生，不要全量架构
expected_behaviors: Does not run full L1-L6 unless asked

evals.prompt: 代码库审核并生成 shadcn 那种 plans
expected_behaviors: Does not claim to output shadcn-style plan files
